## Tests

<!-- The CI runs `npm test` and `npm run build` on Node 20 + 22 -
check the box that matches what you actually did. -->

- [ ] Added unit test(s) (added a `tests/*.test.js` file or extended an
      existing one)
- [ ] Updated existing test(s) (e.g. fixed a test that was passing for
      the wrong reason, or expanded coverage to a new edge case)
- [ ] No tests added (explain why in the summary - e.g. "doc-only
      change", "docs typo fix", "CI config update")

## Backwards compatibility

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test` and `npm run build` and there are no errors.
- [ ] I ran a smoke test of the affected flow on a real Windows desktop
      (clean W10/W11 VM or your own machine).
- [ ] I checked that the user-facing feature still works after the change
      (paste the PowerShell / DevTools output below).
- [ ] I didn't commit secrets, API keys, machine paths, or anything that
      doesn't belong in an open-source repo.
